title:
NZ Postcode Boundary File in ESRI shapefile format
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## NZ Postcode Boundary File in ESRI shapefile format
Vector GIS file set in ESRI shapefile format containing polygons of all NZ postcodes as of a particular date.
... anonymizing large address data sets, such as the one I'm working with now.  One can use a postcode rather than a street or numbered address to quickly produce meaningful information about the geographic distribution of compiled demographic data, without revealing personal information.  I did this a lot, using ZIP code maps, when I was a researcher in the US.
... making data available that, up to now, have been difficult or impossible to obtain.

### Response from New Zealand Post Limited
Status Request received
Comments This is available for purchase, email datasolutions@nzpost.co.nz for details
- Daehyun Park 27 November 2025 at 13:16 01:16 pm (7 months ago) Kia ora Could I have the shp file as title as NZ Postcode Boundary File in ESRI shapefile format. I just need Waikato Area to test street address match with the area name and code. Ngaa Mihi, Daehyun Park
